## Fits the non-negotiables?

SplitFair is deliberately offline, account-free, and right-sized (see [CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)). Please note how your idea fits:

- [ ] Works fully offline, no account, no data leaving the device
- [ ] Doesn't require SwiftData / a second state object / heavy architecture
- [ ] Keeps money ink-on-paper and exact-cent
